# Digital Nomad Guide for Chinese Passport Holders

> A comprehensive open-source data platform for digital nomads, global mobility, and Chinese passport travel.

## About

Digital Nomad Guide (数字游民指南) is an open-source project providing structured data and insights for Chinese passport holders seeking global mobility. The platform covers 60 countries, 122 digital nomad cities, 50+ visa types, and offers tools for comparison, route planning, and search.

## Data API

The project provides machine-readable JSON APIs at:

- `/api/countries.json` — 60 countries with scores, costs, safety, internet speed, visa status
- `/api/cities.json` — 122 digital nomad cities with coworking spaces, climate, neighborhoods
- `/api/visas.json` — 50+ visa types and requirements
- `/api/stats.json` — Platform statistics and last update timestamp

All data is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

## Key Data Points

### Country Data Schema
- `digital_nomad_score`: 0-100 composite score
- `cost_of_living_index`: 0-100 relative index
- `safety_index`: 0-100 safety score
- `internet_speed_avg_mbps`: Average internet speed
- `china_passport_visa_status`: visa_free | evisa | visa_required
- `has_digital_nomad_visa`: boolean
- `climate_zone`: Mediterranean | Tropical | Temperate | Continental | Subtropical | Polar | Desert
- `timezone`: UTC offset
- `dn_community_size`: Large | Medium | Small
- `median_stay_months`: Typical stay duration

### City Data Schema
- `digital_nomad_score`: 0-100
- `cost_of_living_index`: 0-100
- `rent_index`: 0-100
- `coworking_spaces`: Number of coworking spaces
- `coworking_score`: 0-100
- `remote_work_friendly_score`: 0-100 composite
- `monthly_cost_usd_low` / `monthly_cost_usd_high`: Estimated monthly costs
- `climate`, `avg_temp_c`, `rainy_season`
- `english_level`, `chinese_community_size`
- `walkability`, `bike_friendly`: 0-100

## Content

The site publishes data-driven articles including:
- Global digital nomad city rankings (TOP 20)
- Safest digital nomad cities guide
- Most affordable digital nomad cities
- Seasonal travel guides by climate
- Cost of living analysis across 60 countries
- China passport visa-free destination guides
- Digital nomad visa application guides

## Tools

- **Country Comparison**: Side-by-side comparison of 2-3 countries
- **Route Planner**: Pre-planned digital nomad routes (Southeast Asia, Europe Schengen, Mediterranean)
- **Smart Search**: Fuzzy search across 76+ data fields
- **AI Assistant**: Chat-based Q&A using the dataset

## Languages

Content is available in Chinese (zh-CN) and English (en). Hreflang tags are implemented for all article pages.

## GitHub

https://github.com/kfat77/digital-nomad-cn
